data.name: Hero_ImgAlt
data.value: DIDIDAI volunteers with children from the orphanage in Kathmandu

data.name: Hero_Titular
data.value: Of every euro, 99 cents reach the children.

data.name: Hero_Sub
data.value: No administration or marketing costs. Our team is made up of volunteers. We care for and educate children and young people with functional diversity in an orphanage in Kathmandu.

data.name: Act_Titulo
data.value: Educating and caring, every day, in Kathmandu

data.name: Act_Texto
data.value: DIDIDAI's work takes place in Nepal: the education of children and young people with functional diversity at an orphanage in Kathmandu, through innovative educational resources, multisensory stimulation and creative development, as well as therapeutic and medical support.

data.name: Fil_Texto
data.value: We want the Convention on the Rights of the Child and the Universal Declaration of Human Rights to become a reality wherever we are. We seek sustainable actions that improve quality of life over the long term, relying on the country's own resources to sustain the work and build capacity within the community.

data.name: Trans_Texto
data.value: There are no administration costs, no marketing costs, and barely any banking fees. The work of our collaborators is voluntary and unpaid.

data.name: Trans_Stat1
data.value: of income goes to direct action

data.name: Obj_1
data.value: The defence of children's rights in their fullest sense.

data.name: Obj_2
data.value: To foster the development of education, and in particular special education, where the greatest needs are found.

data.name: Obj_3
data.value: To promote public awareness of disabilities in those countries.

data.name: Obj_4
data.value: To support the creation of centres of excellence in special education and care for people with disabilities.

data.name: Obj_5
data.value: To help improve the quality of life of everyone in those centres' community: residents and staff alike.

data.name: Obj_6
data.value: To meet these young people's basic needs: physiotherapy, speech therapy, occupational therapy, augmentative communication, mobility support…

data.name: Obj_7
data.value: Our primary area of work: Nepal and the BalMandir orphanage in Kathmandu, providing quality education tailored to each child.

data.name: Col_Texto
data.value: Choose how you would like to help and send us your details. We will get in touch to confirm the details — you are not charged anything until then.

data.name: Col_Punto1
data.value: Your request reaches our team, who review it before enrolling you.

data.name: Col_Punto2
data.value: Your IBAN, if you choose a direct-debit membership, is requested at the confirmation step — never in this public form.

data.name: Col_Punto3
data.value: We handle your data in accordance with the GDPR and never publish or share it.

data.name: Col_TeamingLead
data.value: Donate €1/month through our Teaming group. Teaming handles the management and collection, with no fees: we don't need your details here.

data.name: Col_TeamingNota
data.value: teaming.net opens in a new tab.

data.name: Col_Gracias
data.value: Thank you! We've received your request. Our team will review it and get in touch to confirm the details.

data.name: Form_Consentimiento
data.value: I have read the privacy policy and understand how my data will be processed to manage my request.

data.name: Form_Rgpd_Finalidad_V
data.value: To manage your membership request. No banking details are requested at this stage.

data.name: Form_Rgpd_Legitimacion_V
data.value: Performance of the membership relationship and legal obligations.

data.name: Form_Rgpd_Destinatarios_V
data.value: No data is shared with third parties, except where required by law.

data.name: Form_Rgpd_Derechos_V
data.value: Access, rectification, erasure and other rights, as explained in the privacy policy.

data.name: Form_Nota
data.value: Your data is sent encrypted and is never published.

data.name: Form_Error_Consentimiento
data.value: To continue, please confirm that you have read the privacy policy.

data.name: Form_Error_Telefono
data.value: The phone number must be in international format, with the country code (e.g. +34612345678).

data.name: Con_Texto
data.value: Questions about how to help or about the project? Write to us at info@dididai.org and we'll get back to you.

data.name: Footer_Left
data.value: © DIDIDAI · children's rights and special education · Kathmandu, Nepal
